channel.title: Ghosts on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Ghosts on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Sightings
item.description:
Sightings is an American paranormal and news television show that began in the 1990s. Initially airing as a special titled The UFO Report: Sightings in 1991, it evolved into a weekly program investigating topics like UFOs, ghosts, and Bigfoot. The show was presented in an investigative news format and hosted by Tim White. Sightings aired on various networks, including Fox, and later in syndication, before concluding its run in 1998 with special episodes.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sightings_%28TV_series%29

item.title: Sightings (TV series)
item.description:
Sightings was a paranormal-themed television series that aired from 1991 to 1997, featuring an investigative news format hosted by Tim White. The program covered a variety of fringe topics, including UFO sightings, ghosts, and Bigfoot, and was executive produced by Henry Winkler and Ann Daniel. Following its original run on Fox and in syndication, the show’s legacy continued through various specials and the 2002 television movie Sightings: Heartland Ghost. It remains a notable example of 1990s paranormal television that explored controversial subjects like animal mutilations and extraterrestrial encounters.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sightings_%28TV_series%29
